title: Gate Config Schema
description: Vault-wide gate rules (R-32 type allowlist, R-47 tag-presence advisory, R-37 coupled-surface atomic-lockstep). Authored by Plan 80/81 SP01 (manifest-generalization). Per-plan scope lives in plan manifests (live_mutation_scope); this surface is global.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Hard switch on mismatch (Chrome MV3-style; security-gate posture). Migration via gate-schema-migrate.sh.

gate_manifest_schema.description: URL to the schema spec for cross-system tooling integration. dbt-pattern.

r32.description: R-32 frontmatter type allowlist (Tier 2 DENY). Lifted from pre-write-guard.sh:803-863, 1052-1069. Originally promoted Tier 1 → Tier 2 by spine-remediation-followup P4-T01 (2026-04-17).

schema_path.description: Path to vault-schema.json (defines canonical schema_keys + required fields per type).

accepted_types.description: Allowlist of frontmatter `type:` values. Includes canonical schema keys + aliases. New types require R-37 lockstep commit (vault-schema.json + this allowlist + pre-write-guard.sh case statement + post-write-verify.sh type_map + vault CLAUDE.md).

type_aliases.description: Alias → canonical schema_key map. Aliases pass type allowlist but resolve to canonical key for required-field validation.

exempt_paths.description: Glob patterns relative to vault root that skip R-32 enforcement (operational files, manifests, root CLAUDE.md, sub-folder CLAUDE.md except Engagements/*/CLAUDE.md).

tier_overrides.description: Per-archetype tier override (T4 §3.1 Strict/Standard/Minimal). NEW capability beyond verbatim lift; v1 ships empty array (default Strict for all paths). Path-pattern matching is glob; first-match wins.

r47.description: R-47 tag-presence advisory (Tier 1, never blocks). Lifted from pre-write-guard.sh:933-972. Complements R-32 tag-prefix DENY at :1071-1077.

tag_dimensions.description: Tag prefix grammar (8-dimension list). Tags MUST start with one of these prefixes followed by '/' (per pre-write-guard.sh:1073 grep regex). Used by both R-47 advisory and R-32 Tier 2 DENY (single-sourced in v1).

exempt_paths.description: Glob patterns relative to vault root that skip R-47 advisory. Plan 67 SP03 T-3 (2026-04-22) positive-list semantics.

tag_cap.description: Max tags per file per T4 §3.2. Today implicit; v1 declares structurally.

enforcement_action.description: Advisory-only in v1. Tier 1 — never blocks writes; emits TIER1_MSGS for graph-view diagnostic.

r37.description: R-37 schema-addition lockstep commit rule. Currently documentary (pre-write-guard.sh:25 — 'enforced by git atomicity'). SP01 promotes to STRUCTURAL via Option α: G2 pre-commit denial of partial coupled-surface commits. Same sentinel-override pattern as G2 denylist.

enforcement_action.description: deny=block partial-set commit (Option α structural); warn=log only (shadow-mode 7-day soak through SP01 cutover); dryrun=evaluate without surfacing.

paths.description: Paths/globs (resolved relative to repo root via `git diff --cached --name-only`) that must change atomically.

min_match.description: If staged-diff intersection ≥ min_match, ALL paths must be touched. v1 always 1 (any-touch triggers full-set requirement).

override_sentinel.description: Path to sentinel file (relative to repo root). Touch + `git commit --no-verify` bypasses R-37 (mirrors existing G2 denylist override pattern). Two physical actions required.
